headline: American International Group (AIG) Posts 51% Income Surge in Q4 Driven by Strong Underwriting Results
summary: American International Group Inc. (NYSE:AIG) is one of the dirt cheap stocks to buy now. On February 11, American International Group reported the financial performance for 2025, highlighted by a 51% year-over-year surge in Q4 adjusted after-tax income to $1.96 per diluted share. For the full year, the company generated $4 billion in adjusted after-tax […]
